---
title: "Reading List"
---

## Beginner

- Seurat official tutorials
- Bioconductor single-cell workflows
- 10x Genomics documentation on feature-barcode matrices

## Concepts

- Single-cell RNA-seq vs bulk RNA-seq
- UMI and barcode logic
- Quality control in droplet-based scRNA-seq
- Cell-type annotation and marker genes

## Advanced later

- Integration and batch correction
- Pseudobulk differential expression
- Pseudotime and trajectory inference
- Cell-cell communication inference
